title: Your hiring adventure
subtitle: See the full loop before you're in it. Pick a stage, practice with Coach, ship when you're ready.

stages.title: CV & pre-screen
stages.problemYouSolve: Recruiters decide in seconds whether your story matches the role — before anyone reads your code.
stages.description: Mission fit, impact bullets, and the narrative that survives an ATS + human skim.

stages.title: Technical screen
stages.problemYouSolve: They want to know you can think through a problem — not memorize 200 LeetCode patterns.
stages.description: High-level coding: arrays, decomposition, debugging under pressure. One problem, clear communication.

stages.title: Ship test / Work Ticket
stages.problemYouSolve: Companies like VERVE replace whiteboard puzzles with a scoped ticket: fork, implement, open a PR.
stages.description: Format varies by company: 4-hour API ticket, 24h micro-ship, or take-home. Output is the signal.

stages.title: Soft skills & team fit
stages.tagline: The round that decides the offer
stages.problemYouSolve: STAR stories, pushback, mentorship, pragmatism — and the ethics probes at mission-driven companies.
stages.description: VERVE-style five phases plus ethics & team-fit coaching with sample questions and answer frameworks.

stages.title: Pairing & final loop
stages.tagline: Code with the team you'll join
stages.problemYouSolve: Live pairing, repo review, or architecture discussion — they watch how you work, not just what you say.
stages.description: Personal IDE session, PR review, or system design. Often the last gate before the offer.
